html.body: [-:-] Given input is not a valid SBGN-ML file. [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1112703_74] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1112510_43] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1112604_62] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1112602_51] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1112514_38] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1112727_58] Product lines should be reversed [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_70101_181] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_7660_81] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5
